◆ BIOCORE Layer 1 Biological Flow Engine
EQUILIBRIUM: --

BioCore

Deterministic biological governance engine. Metabolic, circulatory, neurological, and thermal flow routing — 42 nodes across 4 irreducible primitives. The body is a system. We route it like one.

4 PRIMITIVES
42 NODES
-- EQUILIBRIUM
Architecture
The body decomposes into four irreducible biological flows
☣
Metabolic
10 NODES
Energy conversion, nutrient sufficiency, glucose stability, and metabolic flexibility.
❤
Circulatory
10 NODES
Cardiovascular pressure, oxygenation, hydration, and fluid balance governance.
⚛
Neurological
11 NODES
Sleep architecture, cognitive clarity, emotional stability, and autonomic balance.
⚠
Thermal
11 NODES
Stress load, inflammatory resilience, immune activation, and recovery debt.
How It Works
BioCore reads the body like a deterministic system
01
4 Primitives
Every biological state reduces to four irreducible flows: Metabolic, Circulatory, Neurological, and Thermal/Stress. These are the four axes of the engine.
02
42 Nodes
Each flow decomposes into 10-11 measurable nodes (glucose stability, HRV, sleep quality, inflammation load, etc.) — 42 total. Each node holds a value from 0 (critical) to 100 (optimal).
03
Continuous Sensing
BioCore continuously reads all 42 nodes, computes flow pressures, and maintains an equilibrium score — a single number that tells you how stable the biological system is right now.
04
Deterministic Governance
The governance engine enforces hard constraints. If a node crosses a critical threshold, the system flags, escalates, and reroutes. No guessing. No probabilistic models. Pure deterministic flow control.
--
Equilibrium
Live Telemetry
Real-time node monitoring across the active primitive
BIOCORE.
© 2026 Invariant Foundation. Deterministic Biological Governance.
